steps.title: Use the worldwide clue
steps.content: The sentence contrasts Rivera's role in the Spanish court with the fact that painters around the world used his techniques. The blank should mean that his influence was not limited to Spain.

steps.title: Reject imprecise phrases
steps.content:
• Choice A concerns where influence came from, not where it reached.
  • Choice B suggests recognition within Spain, but the point is worldwide influence.
  • Choice D suggests suppression by Spain, which the passage never mentions.
The remaining choice means limited to. The answer is C.
